Package org.finos.fluxnova.connect.plugin.impl

Class ConnectorVariableScope

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.core.variable.scope.AbstractVariableScope
org.finos.fluxnova.connect.plugin.impl.ConnectorVariableScope
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.delegate.VariableScope, org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.core.variable.event.VariableEventDispatcher
public class ConnectorVariableScope extends org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.core.variable.scope.AbstractVariableScope
Exposes a connector request as variableScope.
Author:
Daniel Meyer
